directors.name: Lamberto Andreotti
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Bristol-Myers Squibb. Serves as Chair of the People and Compensation Committee and as a member of the Sustainability and Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Klaus A. Engel
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Executive Officer of Evonik Industries. Serves on the Audit Committee and the Governance and Compliance Committee.

directors.name: David C. Everitt
directors.bio_summary: Retired Agricultural and Turf Division President of Deere and Company. Serves on the Governance and Compliance Committee and the Sustainability and Innovation Committee. Currently serves on three other public company boards, including one where he is lead independent director.

directors.name: Janet P. Giesselman
directors.bio_summary: Retired President and General Manager of Dow Oil and Gas. Serves on the Governance and Compliance Committee and the Sustainability and Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Karen H. Grimes
directors.bio_summary: Retired Senior Managing Director and Partner at Wellington Management. Serves on the Audit Committee and the People and Compensation Committee.

directors.name: Michael O. Johanns
directors.bio_summary: Retired U.S. Senator and U.S. Secretary of Agriculture. Serves on the Governance and Compliance Committee and the Sustainability and Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Rebecca B. Liebert
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of The Lubrizol Corporation. Serves as Chair of the Sustainability and Innovation Committee and as a member of the People and Compensation Committee.

directors.name: Marcos M. Lutz
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Ultrapar Participações S.A. Serves on the People and Compensation Committee and the Sustainability and Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Charles V. Magro
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Corteva, Inc. As the sole non-independent director, he does not serve on any Board committees.

directors.name: Nayaki R. Nayyar
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Securonix, Inc. Serves on the Audit Committee and the Governance and Compliance Committee.

directors.name: Gregory R. Page
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Cargill, Incorporated. Serves as independent Chair of the Board and as Chair of the Governance and Compliance Committee, and as a member of the Audit Committee. Currently serves on three other public company boards.

directors.name: Kerry J. Preete
directors.bio_summary: Retired Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer of Monsanto Company. Serves on the People and Compensation Committee and the Sustainability and Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Patrick J. Ward
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Financial Officer of Cummins Inc. Serves as Chair of the Audit Committee and as a member of the People and Compensation Committee.

extraction_notes: Tenure years on board were not explicitly stated in the extracted text; only the average tenure of 3.1 years across the board was mentioned. The 'other_public_boards' field lists only companies explicitly named in the proxy as current public-company directorships; the proxy states Page and Everitt each serve on three other public company boards but does not name those companies in the extracted text. Rebecca Liebert's role is mapped to 'nominating_committee_chair' as the closest available schema value for Sustainability and Innovation Committee Chair, though this is an imperfect match. No executive officer section was present in the provided text. The 'other_public_boards' count from the summary table (0, 0, 3, 2, 2, 1, 0, 1, 0, 2, 3, 2, 1) is noted but specific company names were not provided for most directors.
